metadata.description: SMO Ops Brain Marketplace. Universal Layer A plugins for SMO-AI Customer Onboarding system. Phase 1 (Input Capture) and Phase 2 (Brain Context) available. Phase 3-5 plus cockpit and plugin-creator coming.

plugins.name: smo-ai-onboarding
plugins.description: Phase 1 Input Capture. 6 sub-skills (mini-intake, source extraction, memory mining, files request, interview, validator). MENA-optimized bilingual EN/AR. Includes Acme-MENATech synthetic test fixture.

plugins.name: smo-ai-brain
plugins.description: Phase 2 Brain Context. Converts locked Phase 1 inputs into the customer business brain (About-Me + Project + Config) at Class A. Zero-hallucination with traceability enforcement. Multi-project aware (shared About-Me across sibling projects). Dogfooded on Newmind-Coaching + Newmind-Wellness.
